---
title: "Herb of the Field, The By the author of “The Kings of England”, “Langley School”, “Scenes and Characters”, etc.. "
---

## Herb of the Field, The By the author of “The Kings of England”, “Langley School”, “Scenes and Characters”, etc.. 

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1853
**Genre:** Non-fiction: natural history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
